claims: The skill description mentions handling 2FA by "notifies user via iMessage," which implies accessing or integrating with the user's iMessage service. This functionality is unrelated to the core purpose of creating/managing Microsoft Forms and introduces an unnecessary dependency on a personal communication channel, potentially exposing message data or sending unauthorized notifications. 2FA can be handled through standard manual entry or secure authentication flows without involving iMessage.
